name: Remote Web Server Scanner
notes: Reports a remote host attempting reconnaissance or suspicious connections on common local web server ports to more than 60 hosts in 10 minutes.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times
conditions_text: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 59 destination IP within 10 minutes
when the context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: Web Ports
thresholds: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 59 destination IP within 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Remote Web Server Scanner on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 59 destination IP within 10 minutes
AND when the context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
AND when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: Web Ports
RED_list: Event name: Remote Web Scanner Detected
Event description: Detected a remote host attempting reconnaissance or suspicious connections on common local web server ports to more than 60 hosts in 10 minutes.
